message:
Fix shell escape injection, snippet highlighting, and clippy-driven improvements

restore_process.rs:
- Switch shell_escape from double-quote wrapping to single-quote wrapping,
  preventing $variable expansion, backtick execution, and other shell
  metacharacter attacks in paths containing special characters. Also
  include backslash in the set of characters that trigger quoting, and
  handle embedded single quotes with the '\'' idiom.

tantivy_query.rs:
- Fix extract_snippets highlight insertion: the previous code used
  replacen() which could match the term at the wrong position within the
  fragment if the same substring appeared earlier. Now uses exact
  relative-position math (pos - start) to splice in highlight markers
  at the correct offset. Also pre-allocates the highlighted string.

runtime.rs:
- Remove unnecessary `mut` on config_rx in the retention and discovery
  loops — the watch receiver is shared and does not require mutability
  for the config_update_pending / config_take_update pattern.

connector_lifecycle.rs, connector_registry.rs, fleet_launcher.rs,
session_profiles.rs, swarm_scheduler.rs:
- Add Eq derive alongside existing PartialEq on ManagedConnector,
  LifecycleManagerConfig, ConnectorRegistryConfig, FleetSpec,
  SessionProfile, Persona, FleetTemplate, and ScaleEvent — all fields
  are Eq-compatible and this silences clippy::derive_partial_eq_without_eq.

tailer.rs:
- Simplify low-priority reserve calculation from (effective_limit * 2) / 10
  to effective_limit / 5 — mathematically identical but clearer intent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
